title: SAKMEO Benthic Photo-Quadrat Cover — Point-Count Transects (2014-2023)
abstract: Wide-format benthic cover point-count data from SAKMEO (Saudi Aramco-KAUST Marine Environmental Observatory) photo-quadrat surveys, covering hundreds of transects across reef sites from Duba in the north to Farasan-adjacent sites, surveyed intermittently between 2014 and 2023 (repeat visits at some sites in 2014, 2016, 2017, 2019, and 2023). Each row is a benthic cover category (e.g. hard coral, macroalgae, rubble, sand, debris); each column is one transect (site + year + replicate), with cover values as proportions. A companion Metadata sheet gives per-transect site name, coordinates, region, reef, depth, exposure, and distance-to-shore.

variables.name: Category major
variables.label: Major Cover Category
variables.description: Broad benthic cover group per row (e.g. hard coral, algae, sponge, abiotic).

variables.name: Category
variables.label: Cover Category Code
variables.description: Short code for the specific benthic category (e.g. DEBRIS).

variables.name: transect_columns
variables.label: Per-Transect Cover Fraction
variables.description: One column per transect (named by site code, year, and replicate, e.g. DR12_10m_T1), giving the fraction of points assigned to this category on that transect.

variables.name: Label
variables.label: Transect Label
variables.description: Short transect identifier joining to the column headers in the Benthic_cover sheet.

variables.name: Lat
variables.label: Latitude
variables.description: Site latitude in degrees-minutes format (e.g. '27 50.8511'), not decimal degrees.

variables.name: Long
variables.label: Longitude
variables.description: Site longitude in degrees-minutes format, not decimal degrees.

variables.name: Region
variables.label: Region Code
variables.description: Short region code (e.g. DUB for Duba).

access.how_to_request: Not independently verified; assumed to require the same SAKMEO data-sharing process as other SAKMEO products pending confirmation with the data steward.

known_issues: Lat/Long recorded in degrees-minutes string format in the Metadata sheet (e.g. '27 50.8511'), not decimal degrees — needs conversion before mapping.
Transect column headers encode site/year/replicate in an inconsistent ad-hoc naming scheme (e.g. DR12_10m_T1 vs AM Reef_0219_10_1) — a lookup table would help but wasn't found alongside the file.
Relationship to sakmeo-fish-visual-census-2014-2023 (same observatory, overlapping years, different survey method) is not established — likely companion surveys at some of the same sites.
n_rows for the Metadata sheet is an approximate count of named transects (~500+ columns observed in Benthic_cover), not an exact row count.
